metadata.name: ww-dropdown
metadata.description: A customizable dropdown menu component that can be triggered by click, hover, or right-click, with configurable positions, alignments, offsets, and optional animations. The dropdown content is rendered as a portal (teleported) to avoid overflow clipping issues.
features: Click, hover, or right-click trigger modes
Configurable position (top, right, bottom, left) and alignment (start, center, end)
Customizable X and Y offsets in px or %
Optional slide animation with transform origin based on position
Responsive: hover mode falls back to click on mobile

properties.name: triggerType
properties.description: Type of interaction that opens the dropdown. 'click' opens on click, 'hover' opens on mouse enter (falls back to click on mobile), 'right-click' opens on context menu.

properties.name: position
properties.description: Position of the dropdown relative to the trigger element.

properties.name: alignment
properties.description: Alignment of the dropdown along the position axis. For top/bottom positions: start=left, center=centered, end=right. For left/right positions: start=top, center=centered, end=bottom.

properties.name: offsetX
properties.description: Horizontal offset of the dropdown from the trigger element, as a string with unit (e.g. '10px' or '50%').

properties.name: offsetY
properties.description: Vertical offset of the dropdown from the trigger element, as a string with unit (e.g. '8px' or '20%').

properties.name: dropdownZIndex
properties.description: Z-index of the dropdown overlay. Range 0-100.

properties.name: disabled
properties.description: When true, disables the dropdown so it cannot be opened by any trigger.

properties.name: animated
properties.description: When true, enables a slide/scale animation when the dropdown opens and closes.

properties.name: forceDisplayEditor
properties.description: When true, forces the dropdown to be displayed in editor mode for design purposes.

slots.name: triggerLayout
slots.description: The element(s) that serve as the trigger for the dropdown. Clicking, hovering, or right-clicking this area (depending on triggerType) will open the dropdown.

slots.name: dropdownLayout
slots.description: The content displayed inside the dropdown when it is open. Can contain any elements such as menus, lists, forms, etc.

specifications: The dropdown is teleported to the app root to avoid overflow clipping from parent containers.
On mobile screen sizes, hover trigger type automatically falls back to click behavior.
The dropdown auto-closes when clicking outside of both the trigger and dropdown areas.
When animated is true, the dropdown uses a slide + scale transition with transform origin based on position and alignment.
Nested dropdowns are supported: clicking inside a child dropdown won't close parent dropdowns.
forceDisplayEditor only affects editor mode preview and has no effect in production.
Does not support programmatic open — only the closeDropdown action is available.
Does not support custom transition durations or easing; animation timing is fixed.

examples.description: A simple click-triggered dropdown menu positioned below the trigger with a button as trigger and a list of items.
A hover-triggered dropdown positioned to the right, centered alignment.
